---
title: 'Untitled Post'
date: '2015-01-30T14:49:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'DRAFT'
blogger_post_id: '1645992150383073215'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
---

<p class="mobile-photo"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/0130150847-744953-24e07d65cbb2.jpg"><img src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/0130150847-744953-144080255c15.jpg"  border="0" alt="" id="BLOGGER_PHOTO_ID_6110146511187572274" /></a></p>1993 Acura Legend
